method_summary: SWE-agent introduces a custom agent-computer interface (ACI) that enables language model agents to autonomously use computers for software engineering tasks, including creating/editing code files, navigating repositories, and executing tests.
key_innovation: Custom agent-computer interface (ACI) that significantly enhances LM agents' ability to interact with software development environments
title: SWE-agent: Agent-Computer Interfaces Enable Automated Software Engineering
